title: A difference in the numbers
wikitext:
[]: A difference in the numbers Post by whiemeat » Tue Aug 20, 2013 4:49 pm with what ive managed to interpret from NGE there is a multitude of numbers relating to other subjects such as eva unit 00 houses the first child adding a "1" onto "00" turns it into "01" then we have the second child which makes a "2" onto "1" making the third child using unit 01 subtract into "00" this means the children are really on a never ending loop

[]: Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 20, 2013 9:13 pm Erhm, what? I'm moving this to chit chat, and considering it a chat about number plays within Eva, until a more focused and coherent reason merits the OP's intended topic to remain in discussion. Otherwise this is just spam if there's no clear purpose for discussion. There may still be potential for the thread if the OP would like to elaborate and clarify what exactly he means.

[]: Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 20, 2013 10:41 pm I think this is an example of why not to post while stoned.

[]: Post by Chuckman » Tue Aug 20, 2013 11:26 pm Oh boo, I come up with weirder stuff all the time and I'm as sober as a preacher on Sunday.

[]: Post by Melchior » Wed Aug 21, 2013 8:42 am NemZ wrote: I think this is an example of why not to post while stoned.
